description_long: This is a muscular adult male dressed in military-style attire, featuring a fitted short-sleeve shirt, tactical vest with pouches, and camouflage cargo pants. He wears a beret on his head and fingerless gloves, with one hand raised in a salute and the other held behind his back. His boots are rugged and suitable for urban or combat environments, and he has protective knee pads strapped over his pants. The figure's stance is formal and disciplined, suggesting a soldier or security personnel. The overall appearance is that of a well-equipped, physically fit individual prepared for urban operations.
description: A muscular adult male in military attire, saluting with one hand and standing in a formal, disciplined pose. He wears a beret, tactical vest, camouflage cargo pants, and rugged boots.
description_view_0: Side view showing the beret, muscular build, and the right hand raised in a salute, with the left hand behind the back.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the formal salute, tactical vest, and the symmetrical stance with both boots visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the left profile, with the saluting hand and tactical gear details visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the beret, vest straps, and the left arm held behind the back.
attribute_clothing_type: military uniform with tactical vest, cargo pants, and protective knee pads
attribute_posture: standing upright with right hand saluting and left hand behind back
